title: Agent server config and offline detection
description: Add TheWatcherAgent.conf with THEWATCHER_SERVER support, make agents request current config after submitting data, and mark agents offline when the server has not seen them within a configurable threshold.
acceptance_criteria: The default agent config file is named TheWatcherAgent.conf.
The agent config supports THEWATCHER_SERVER=<ip address or hostname> and derives enrollment/data endpoints from it.
The agent remains the side that establishes server connections.
After each metrics submission, the agent asks the server for current config.
The server replies to config requests with the agent's current interval and process limit settings.
The server marks approved agents offline when last_seen is older than offline_after_seconds.
Docs, changelog, and version are updated.

tasks.title: Add agent conf parsing
tasks.description: Update agent/config.cpp and agent/config.hpp so AgentConfig::default_path returns TheWatcherAgent.conf and load/save support KEY=VALUE format including THEWATCHER_SERVER.
acceptance_criteria: Existing JSON configs remain readable for compatibility.

unit: GIVEN a conf file with THEWATCHER_SERVER WHEN loaded THEN server and enrollment addresses are derived.

tasks.implementation_notes: Keep AgentConfig fields intact. Add helpers in agent/config.cpp for key-value parsing and endpoint derivation while preserving JSON loading if the first non-space character is '{'.

tasks.title: Add config request protocol
tasks.description: Add CONFIG_REQUEST frames sent by the agent after each METRICS frame, and make the server respond with ConfigUpdate using stored per-agent settings.
acceptance_criteria: Agent sends CONFIG_REQUEST after each metrics frame.
Server handles CONFIG_REQUEST without polling or dialing agents.
ConfigUpdate reflects stored collection interval and process limit.

unit: GIVEN a server store record with settings WHEN serialized through API/store THEN settings persist.
integration: Existing server-agent integration continues passing with config requests in the loop.

tasks.implementation_notes: Extend common/protocol.hpp FrameType. Add collection_interval and process_limit to AgentRecord/SQLite/API. Update API set_interval and set_process_limit to persist settings before queuing commands.

tasks.title: Add offline threshold
tasks.description: Add ServerConfig::offline_after_seconds with default and server loop maintenance that flips connected=false when an approved agent has not been seen within the threshold.
acceptance_criteria: Approved connected agents become connected=false after the threshold.
Rejected/pending agents are not force-marked online.

unit: GIVEN an old approved connected agent WHEN offline marking runs THEN connected becomes false.

tasks.implementation_notes: Prefer a small Server::mark_offline_agents helper so server_lifecycle_test can exercise it without sleeping on a full server loop.

tasks.title: Docs and release bookkeeping
tasks.description: Update docs, changelog, and MODULE.bazel for the new config file and offline/config query behavior.
acceptance_criteria: CHANGELOG records agent config, config request, and offline threshold behavior.
Docs explain that agents submit data and initiate all connections.
tasks.implementation_notes: Update docs/dashboard.md and add/update agent config documentation if present.

edges.label: Config request uses loaded agent endpoints.
Offline state depends on agent inbound frames.
